home.badge: Best game deals, updated every 5 minutes
home.title: Find Your Next Game
home.subtitle: Compare prices across 30+ stores. Use AI to find deals in natural language. Never miss a sale.
home.feature1Desc: Prices from Steam, GOG, Humble, Epic and 30+ more stores updated constantly.
home.feature2Desc: "cheap RPGs under $5" or "best rated strategy games on sale" — just ask naturally.
home.feature3Desc: Save games you want and track their prices over time. Never pay full price again.

deals.title: Game Deals
deals.noDeals: No deals found with these filters.

free.title: Free
free.subtitle: Games that are completely free right now. Grab them before they're gone!
free.noGamesDesc: Check back soon, new free games are added regularly!

search.title: AI Game Search
search.subtitle: Describe what you're looking for in plain English. Our AI will find the best deals for you.
search.placeholder: e.g. cheap action RPGs under $10 on Steam...
search.errorGeneric: Search could not be completed right now
search.noDeals: No deals found for this search.
search.noDealsDesc: Try a different query or broaden your criteria.
search.example2: highly rated strategy games on sale

wishlist.title: My Wishlist
wishlist.emptyDesc: Browse deals and add games you want to track.

auth.signInDesc: Sign in to access your wishlist
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a confirmation link!

popular.title: Popular Games
popular.subtitle: We list this month's most popular games together, whether they are discounted or not. Add any game to your wishlist and get notified when it goes on sale.
popular.monthlyPicksDesc: This month's most popular games, with discounted and regular-priced titles shown together
popular.notifyAdded: You will be notified when it goes on sale
popular.notifyHint: Add it to your list and get sale alerts
